prose.en: Authorizing Log Access (indicator varies by certification class; see class-variants payload).

b.statement: **Optional:** A least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model is used and persistently reviewed for access to log data based on organizationally defined data sensitivity.

c.statement: A least-privileged, role and attribute-based, and just-in-time access authorization model is used and persistently reviewed for access to log data based on organizationally defined data sensitivity.
